# cicd-reviewer

CICD Reviewer — a heaven-framework agent (image: ghcr.io/sancovp/cicd-reviewer) that reads a PR's diff, finds real correctness/security bugs traced to an exact symptom, and posts the review with gh. Configured entirely by its baked-in cicd_aios (.claude/rules + .claude/skills). The image is built separately from base/heaven-framework by the monorepo's build-cicd-reviewer.yml; this repo carries only the reviewer's own source (Dockerfile, ci_agent.py, cicd_aios).
